race.comment: MISTER SELFIE (6) has been racing well over seven furlongs but does boast four of five career wins at the mile. Hard to fault and should go close. DRIALLE (2) finished fifth last start over 1200m at Murwillumbah after racing on the pace for much of the way. Extra trip suits and goes very well here so worth another try. NAILS AND PRIDE (1) proved too strong two runs ago but was not as effective last time out when eighth over 1350m at Ipswich, beaten 6 lengths. Should be thereabouts.  LOCH AWE (9) doesn't win out of turn but is a consistent performer and has placed 2/3 when fresh. Fitter for a trial placing and should run well.
